description: Trusted source registry for Phase 1 of the Nvidia Intelligence POC. The registry is intentionally broad, while active ingestion remains narrow and high-signal.

sources.purpose: Authoritative Nvidia SEC filings for risk factors, financial disclosures, business dependencies, customer/supplier exposure, and regulatory context.
Official annual reports and proxy materials for long-form strategy, risk, market exposure, governance, and business context.
Direct SEC filing archive for Nvidia CIK 1045810, used as regulator-controlled source of truth.
sources.notes: Use SEC-compliant user agent for scripted fetching.

sources.purpose: Machine-readable Nvidia SEC submissions index for discovering 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K and other filings.
Machine-readable Nvidia XBRL facts for structured financial validation.
sources.notes: Useful after the first evidence pipeline works.

sources.purpose: Official Bureau of Industry and Security source for export-control policy affecting advanced AI chips and semiconductor equipment.
sources.notes: Use specific BIS pages after discovery.

sources.purpose: Official legal source for export-control rules affecting advanced computing and semiconductor supply chains.
sources.notes: Search page; ingest exact rules after discovery.

sources.purpose: Official quarterly results for revenue mix, data center growth, margin commentary, guidance, and near-term signals.
Official earnings releases and financial reports for structured financial and segment-level evidence.
Investor presentations and event materials for management messaging, product roadmap, and market positioning.
Trusted external news for validation of Nvidia, supplier, hyperscaler, export-control, and semiconductor events.
sources.notes: Do not scrape automatically unless licensed.

sources.purpose: Official Nvidia announcements, partnerships, launches, and company narrative for event discovery.
sources.notes: Company-controlled; source weight lower than filings.

sources.purpose: Latest official Nvidia announcements for product, partnership, and ecosystem event detection.
Official Blackwell platform announcement for AI accelerator roadmap and product positioning evidence.
Official data center product portfolio for mapping GPUs, systems, networking, and AI factory offerings.
Official CUDA source for software ecosystem, developer lock-in, and platform strength evidence.
Official technical documentation hub for CUDA, networking, deployment, and product documentation.
sources.notes: Use selectively; too broad for first ingestion.

sources.purpose: Official hiring source for weak signals around supply chain, CUDA, systems, networking, and infrastructure focus.
TSMC investor source for foundry capacity, capex, advanced nodes, and Nvidia manufacturing dependency context.
Official CoWoS technology source for advanced packaging and HBM integration context around AI accelerators.
Official SK hynix announcements for HBM supply, HBM3E/HBM4, memory roadmap, and AI demand.
Micron investor source for HBM ramp, AI memory demand, capex, and supplier competition.
Official Micron announcements for HBM, memory roadmap, product launches, and AI data center demand.
Samsung investor source for memory, foundry, capex, and supplier/competitor context.
Samsung semiconductor announcements for HBM, foundry, advanced packaging, and AI memory movement.
ASML investor source for lithography capacity and semiconductor equipment constraints affecting advanced-node supply.
ASE investor source for outsourced semiconductor assembly, test, and advanced packaging capacity context.
Amkor investor source for packaging and test capacity, advanced packaging, and OSAT industry signals.
Broadcom investor source for custom AI accelerator, networking ASIC, and competitive movement against Nvidia.
AMD investor source for GPU accelerator competition, data center strategy, and market movement versus Nvidia.
Official AWS/Nvidia collaboration announcement for hyperscaler demand and partner relationship evidence.
Oracle/Nvidia cloud partnership page for OCI GPU demand, deployment options, and customer ecosystem evidence.
Dell/Nvidia AI Factory source for enterprise infrastructure channel and OEM/system integration relationships.
HPE/Nvidia source for enterprise AI factory, private cloud AI, and OEM channel relationship evidence.
Supermicro/Nvidia AI factory source for server ecosystem, channel demand, and system-integration evidence.
Independent benchmark source for AI hardware performance comparisons and external validation of accelerator claims.
sources.notes: Benchmark context; not business evidence alone.

sources.purpose: Patent search source for Nvidia technology direction and R&D signals, used carefully as weak signal evidence.
sources.notes: Manual-only until patent search strategy is defined.

sources.purpose: Official patent source for Nvidia-assigned patents and R&D direction.

sources.source_name: Semiconductor Industry Association Supply Chain Investments
sources.purpose: Industry association context for semiconductor supply-chain investments, CHIPS Act context, and ecosystem mapping.
Standards context for HBM specifications, useful for interpreting memory roadmap and benchmark claims.
Technology trade publication for context on chips, GPUs, memory, packaging, and competitor movement.
Local manually uploaded documents such as permitted PDFs, transcripts, articles, or analyst notes for controlled POC ingestion.
Manually saved earnings call transcripts when official or licensed transcript access is available.
sources.notes: Only use if transcript rights are clear.
